title.en: Added a new architecture study note and a links page
title.zh: 新增了一份体系结构学习笔记和 Links 页面

summary.en: Added a CAQA 6th edition study guide to the notes page, and built a minimal Links page with a fixed Ventus GPGPU link plus recent LLVM release links.
summary.zh: 在笔记页新增了《计算机体系结构：量化研究方法（第6版）》学习手册，同时上线了极简 Links 页面，包含固定的乘影 GPGPU 链接和最近的 LLVM 发布链接。

title.zh: 发布了自己的个人网站

summary.en: Built and published my personal homepage to organize study logs and notes in a clear and lightweight way.
summary.zh: 搭建并发布了个人主页，用更清晰、更轻量的方式整理学习日志和学习笔记。
